title: Frog Knight
move_pattern: Starts with Tongue Lash → Strike Down Evil → For the Queen, then loops back to Tongue Lash. Once, when HP drops below 50% and Beetle Charge has not yet been used, Beetle Charge replaces the next Tongue Lash; after that the normal cycle resumes indefinitely.
notes: Beetle Charge is used at most once per combat. It fires the first time the Frog Knight would use Tongue Lash while below 50% HP (and the charge hasn't been used yet). After that, the cycle reverts to Tongue Lash → Strike Down Evil → For the Queen permanently.
